edgeCases: OPFSBackend scanStream() cannot be tested in Node.js (requires browser OPFS API)
OPFSBackend batchGet/batchSet not testable in Node.js (requires browser OPFS API)
Large file streaming (>100MB) for OPFSBackend not tested (tested 11MB with NodeFsBackend)
Concurrent scanStream() calls on the same backend
SQLiteBackend with real better-sqlite3 database (only tested with mock)
OPFSBackend empty-path validation not testable in Node.js (requires browser OPFS API)
Very long path names (>255 chars) not tested
Content with null bytes not tested
Concurrent delete+set on same path not tested
SQLite auto-selection with real better-sqlite3 (not testable without package installed)
Default DB file path creation at runtime (requires better-sqlite3)
Browser OPFS/IndexedDB detection paths (not testable in Node.js)
OPFS scanStream error logging (requires browser OPFS API)
NodeFsBackend scanStream error logging with unreadable files (needs permission-restricted test files)
Permission denied during OPFS stat() directory lookup (silently swallowed by catch {}, not testable without real OPFS API)
Concurrent stat() calls sharing root handle (possible race condition)
